title: UnderPressure
description: a realistic underwater experience by simulating the effects of water pressure on players as they dive deeper into the ocean.
body:
Dive into the depths with caution! UnderPressure introduces a realistic underwater experience by simulating the effects of water pressure on players as they dive deeper into the ocean. The deeper you go, the more intense the pressure becomes, dealing damage over time. However, with proper preparation and the right potions, you can mitigate or even avoid the effects of this underwater threat.

## Features:

Realistic Water Pressure Damage: 
Players will take damage based on their depth below the surface, adding a new challenge to underwater exploration.

Customizable Configuration:
Easily adjust the depth at which pressure damage starts, the amount of damage taken per level, the interval between damage ticks, and the warning message displayed to players.

Potion Protection: 
Players can protect themselves from the damaging effects of water pressure by drinking a Water Breathing potion.

Action Bar Warnings: 
Players receive a customizable warning in their action bar when they are at risk of taking damage from water pressure.


Configuration Options:

### depthStart: 
The minimum depth below the water's surface where pressure damage begins.
### damagePerLevel: 
The amount of damage dealt per 5 blocks of depth beyond the starting depth.
### damageInterval: 
The time interval between damage ticks and warning messages, in seconds.
### actionBarMessage: 
A customizable message displayed in the action bar when players are taking damage from water pressure.

## How to Use:

Install the plugin on your server.
Customize the config.yml file to set your desired depth, damage, and messages.
Dive deep, but remember to bring your Water Breathing potions to stay safe from the crushing pressure!
